summaryProfile.longBusinessSummary: TeraWulf Inc., together with its subsidiaries, owns, develops, operates digital infrastructure in the United States. It also develops and operates bitcoin mining facilities for bitcoin mining and high-performance computing workloads, leveraging clean, cost-effective, and reliable energy. The company was founded in 2021 and is headquartered in Easton, Maryland.
